description: You are a technical artist for a retro 1990s-style CD-ROM FMV game. Transcode the three 1080p source videos in /home/ga/Videos/raw_footage/ (scene1_intro.mp4, scene2_action.mp4, scene3_ending.mp4) to legacy specifications and save them to /home/ga/Videos/retro_assets/ as scene1_fmv.avi, scene2_fmv.avi, and scene3_fmv.avi. The output files must be grayscale, 320x240 resolution, 15 fps, using the MPEG-4 video codec and mono MP3 audio at 22050 Hz. Burn the corresponding subtitle scripts from /home/ga/Documents/scripts/ (scene1.srt, scene2.srt, scene3.srt) directly into the video frames so that no selectable subtitle streams remain. Generate a JSON report at /home/ga/Videos/retro_assets/compression_report.json with a root key "assets" containing objects for each scene with "id" (e.g., "scene1"), "original_size_kb", "retro_size_kb", and "compression_ratio" (calculated as original_size_kb / retro_size_kb, rounded to 1 decimal place).
